question: Which of the following statements is true based on the chart of the performance index by year?

options.A: The performance index increased each year from 2018 to 2020.
options.B: The performance index in 2019 was higher than in 2020.
options.C: The chart clearly shows the exact performance index value for 2020.
options.D: The performance index was the same in all displayed years.

explanation: The y-axis maximum is below the data maximum, so the top bars are truncated and appear equal.
